bead.title: Stage 4.16: Rewrite Go SPA handler tests + CI rewrite + lefthook cleanup
bead.description: Rewrite TestSPAServesIndexHTML and TestSPAFallbackForClientRoute in cli/internal/server/server_test.go to verify the new embed path serves SvelteKit build output (index.html + a deep link URL both return the SvelteKit shell). Rewrite .github/workflows/ci.yml frontend job: delete Bun-for-React block, add `bun install` + `bun run build` + `bun run test` + `bun run test:e2e`. Delete the `debug-js` hook in lefthook.yml. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #50.
bead.acceptance: (1) `go test ./cli/internal/server/...` passes. (2) CI workflow yaml validates (use `gh workflow view` or `act` dry-run). (3) `lefthook run pre-commit` is clean (no orphaned debug-js hook). (4) MANUAL: commit a test file, pre-commit runs without errors.
